summary: Iteration 14 (CHANTIER 3 — Genesis Workflow) verified end-to-end. Backend: new GET /api/ai/genesis-status returns the exact spec shape {ready:false, fal_ready:false, demucs_ready:true, mode:'demucs_only', default_style:'Bikutsi tropical house', default_bantu:{style:'bikutsi_44',density:16,bars:4}}. Added /app/backend/tests/test_genesis_endpoint.py — 1/1 pass. Full regression `pytest -q -m 'not slow'`: 55 passed, 1 deselected (Demucs slow). Frontend Playwright: genesis-btn rendered between Swing and right-side icons (Swing x=1703, Genesis x=1780), label '🌍 Genesis', exact cyan→magenta→orange gradient verified (rgb(34,211,238) 0%, rgb(217,70,239) 60%, rgb(245,158,11) 100%). Dialog dismiss path → no errors. Dialog accept('test bikutsi') → status line shows the exact required text 'Genesis: FAL_KEY not configured. Set it in /app/backend/.env then restart.'. Magic Generator regression: all 9 tag testIds present (asiko,makossa,bikutsi,rumba,afrobeat,soukous,highlife,ekang,zouk); clicking tag-ekang and tag-zouk appends to styles-input correctly; full create flow still works (24 cards after creation, status-line appears during pending). CHANTIER 1 regression: Window menu has Configurations + Arrange + Disk Usage + System Usage; View menu has Waveforms submenu; RIBA brand visible in MenuBar.

verified_passing.GET /api/ai/genesis-status: 200 OK with exact spec shape — fal_ready:false (FAL_KEY missing), demucs_ready:true, mode:'demucs_only', default_style and default_bantu match spec
verified_passing.Backend regression: 55/55 pytest passing (1 slow Demucs deselected); test_genesis_endpoint adds 1 new test
verified_passing.genesis-btn render: Visible in TopBar, positioned between Swing button and right icons
verified_passing.genesis-btn gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(34,211,238) 0%, rgb(217,70,239) 60%, rgb(245,158,11) 100%) — cyan→magenta→orange exact match
verified_passing.Genesis dialog dismiss: window.prompt opens; dismiss closes cleanly with no error elements on page
verified_passing.Genesis dialog accept (no FAL_KEY): Status bar shows exactly: 'Genesis: FAL_KEY not configured. Set it in /app/backend/.env then restart.' — no crash, no console error
verified_passing.Magic Gen tag-ekang/tag-zouk: Both present (9 tags total); appending to styles-input verified ('Bikutsi, traditional drums, magnetic groove, Ekang, Zouk')
verified_passing.Magic Gen full flow: Modal opens via Event → Magic Generator; all 13 core testIds present; lyrics tab swap works; create-btn creates a new card and surfaces status-line during pending
verified_passing.CHANTIER 1 Window menu: Configurations + Arrange + Disk Usage + System Usage all present

critical_code_review_comments: genesis.py is clean and stateless (44 lines) — only exposes capability probe; actual chaining is in Daw.dispatchGenesis on the frontend as documented.
Daw.jsx runGenesis() correctly short-circuits on !genesisStatus.fal_ready before any network call — verified by Playwright (no /generate-track request fired).

Daw.jsx now exceeds 2300 lines (was 1850 in iter 12). Recommend extracting Genesis orchestrator and Magic Generator probe useEffects into hooks/useGenesis.js + hooks/useMagicGen.js to stay <1500 lines per file.

genesis-status response could include a 'reason' field when fal_ready=false (e.g., 'FAL_KEY_MISSING' vs 'FAL_KEY_PLACEHOLDER') to allow the UI to differentiate; right now the frontend conflates both into the same message.
server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') — non-blocking pytest warning, worth migrating to lifespan handlers (carried over from iter 13).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Genesis + Magic Gen + CHANTIER 1 regression all pass)

seed_data_creation: 1 fallback workspace card created during Magic Gen create-flow verification (TEST_iter14_status). Workspace currently has 24 cards — capped at 60 by _push_entry. No cleanup needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 (CHANTIER 3 Genesis) verified with zero functional bugs. Backend totals: 56/56 pytest passing (1 slow Demucs deselected — opt in with `-m slow`). All new testIds: genesis-btn (TopBar), tag-ekang, tag-zouk (MagicGeneratorModal). The full Genesis chain (window.prompt → /generate-track → fetch WAV → /separate-stems → 4 tracks + Bantu Grid) was NOT exercised because FAL_KEY is intentionally absent; only the early-exit error path was verified. When FAL_KEY is provisioned, write a new Playwright that mocks page.on('dialog') with a real prompt and asserts 4 new track rows + Bantu Grid auto-enabled. Daw.jsx file is now ~2330 lines — refactor recommended but not blocking.
rca of the issue: No bug RCA needed — all spec items pass.
